detail: Focused on DevOps technologies and cloud fundamentals. Worked on Docker containerization, Linux administration, MongoDB Cloud, and Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) fundamentals.
One-month intensive internship focused on Python programming. Worked on practical Python applications, structuring data, and applying logical thinking to real-world problems.
5-day cybersecurity internship gaining foundational knowledge in cybersecurity. Hands-on experience with basic threat modeling and network security tools.
